# Stack Configuration

**Detected:** meta-project (shell + markdown)
**Auto-detected:** false
**Configured manually:** yes

## Commands

| Action | Command |
|---|---|
| Test | `bash scripts/skill-lint.sh` |
| Lint | `bash -n scripts/*.sh && bash -n scripts/git-hooks/*` |
| Type check | `echo "N/A — shell + markdown project"` |
| Build | `echo "N/A — no build step"` |
| Dev | `echo "N/A — static files"` |

## Notes

- This is a meta-project (agent workflow rules, not an application)
- Primary validation: skill-lint.sh + pre-commit hook
- Shell scripts validated with `bash -n` (syntax check)
- Markdown files validated by structure (SKILL.md format)
